title.en: Germany want Klopp talks as Nagelsmann resigns
title.zh-CN: 纳格尔斯曼辞职后，德国希望克洛普会谈

summary.en: The German football association is seeking talks with Jurgen Klopp about becoming their men's national team coach after Julian Nagelsmann resigned.
summary.zh-CN: 德国足球协会正在寻求与尤尔根·克洛普（ Jurgen Klopp ）就朱利安·纳格尔斯曼（ Julian Nagelsmann ）辞职后成为他们的男子国家队教练

title.en: England fan tickets for Mexico on resale for up to £26K
title.zh-CN: 转售墨西哥英格兰球迷票高达£ 26,000

summary.en: Tickets originally bought by England fans for Monday's last 16 game against Mexico are relisted for thousands of pounds on Fifa's official resale portal.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰球迷最初在周一对阵墨西哥的最后16场比赛中购买的门票在国际足联的官方转售门户网站上以数千英镑的价格重新上市。

title.en: After World Cup goals are last year's signings finally set to deliver for Newcastle?
title.zh-CN: 在世界杯进球之后，去年的签约最终将为纽卡斯尔带来什么？

summary.en: Anthony Elanga and Yoane Wissa both struggled in their first season at Newcastle, but five goals between at the World Cup them suggest things will be different next term.
summary.zh-CN: 安东尼·埃兰加（ Anthony Elanga ）和约恩·维萨（ Yoane Wissa ）在纽卡斯尔的第一个赛季都很挣扎，但在世界杯之间的五个进球表明下赛季情况会有所不同。

title.en: 'You can't breathe' - what is it like playing at altitude?
title.zh-CN: “你无法呼吸” -在海拔高度玩游戏是什么感觉？

summary.en: BBC pundits Rachel Corsie and Lucas Leiva explain their experiences of playing football at altitude, ahead of England's game at Estadio Azteca against Mexico which sits 2,240 metres above sea level.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司专家雷切尔·科西（ Rachel Corsie ）和卢卡斯·莱瓦（ Lucas Leiva ）在英格兰阿兹特克体育场（ Estadio Azteca ）对阵海拔2240米的墨西哥队比赛之前，介绍了他们在高空踢足球的经历。

title.en: Portugal through to last 16 after dramatic victory over Croatia
title.zh-CN: 在克罗地亚取得戏剧性胜利后，葡萄牙队取得了16强的成绩

summary.en: Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 with goals from Cristiano Ronaldo and Goncalo Ramos after a chaotic second-half in Toronto to set up a last 16 tie with Iberian rivals Spain.
summary.zh-CN: 在多伦多下半场混乱之后，葡萄牙以克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）和贡萨洛·拉莫斯（ Goncalo Ramos ）的进球以2比1击败克罗地亚，与伊比利亚对手西班牙建立了最后16个平局。

title.en: Late VAR drama as Croatia denied equaliser
title.zh-CN: 克罗地亚拒绝均衡器的后期VAR戏剧

summary.en: Josko Gvardiol's stoppage-time goal is ruled out for offside after a VAR review, denying Croatia an equaliser against Portugal in their World Cup knockout match in Toronto.
summary.zh-CN: 在VAR审查后， Josko Gvardiol的停赛时间目标被排除在越位之外，否认克罗地亚在多伦多的世界杯淘汰赛中对阵葡萄牙的均衡器。

title.en: Ronaldo levels from penalty spot for Portugal
title.zh-CN: 罗纳尔多在葡萄牙点球位置的水平

summary.en: Portugal captain Cristiano Ronaldo draws his side level from the penalty spot against Croatia during their round of 32 game in Toronto.
summary.zh-CN: 葡萄牙队长克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）在多伦多举行的32轮比赛中，在对阵克罗地亚的点球赛中获得了侧位。

title.en: Ronaldo has equaliser ruled out for offside
title.zh-CN: 罗纳尔多将扳平比分排除在越位之外

summary.en: Cristiano Ronaldo has an equalising goal ruled out for offside during Portugal's round of 32 game with Croatia in Toronto.
summary.zh-CN: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）在葡萄牙与克罗地亚队在多伦多举行的32轮比赛中被排除在越位球之外。

title.en: Arsenal sign Lioness Stanway from Bayern
title.zh-CN: 来自拜仁的阿森纳标志Lioness Stanway

summary.en: England midfielder Georgia Stanway says she is joining Arsenal to "win trophies and grow as a player".
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰中场球员乔治亚·斯坦威（ Georgia Stanway ）表示，她将加入阿森纳，以“赢得奖杯并成长为一名球员”。

title.en: Denmark defender Thomsen signs two-year London City deal
title.zh-CN: 丹麦后卫汤姆森签署为期两年的伦敦城协议

summary.en: London City Lionesses sign Denmark international defender Janni Thomsen from Utah Royals FC.
summary.zh-CN: 伦敦城市女狮队从犹他皇家足球俱乐部签下丹麦国际后卫詹妮·汤姆森。

title.en: Victorious Portugal pay emotional tribute to Jota

summary.en: One year after his death, Portugal are using Diogo Jota's memory to help inspire them at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 在他去世一年后，葡萄牙正在利用Diogo Jota的记忆来帮助他们在2026年世界杯上获得灵感。

title.en: Mahrez retires from Algeria duty after World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: 世界杯退出后，马赫雷斯从阿尔及利亚退役

summary.en: Algeria captain Riyad Mahrez announces his retirement from international football after the Desert Foxes’ 2-0 defeat by Switzerland in the World Cup round of 32.
summary.zh-CN: 阿尔及利亚队长里亚德·马赫雷斯（ Riyad Mahrez ）宣布退出国际足球比赛，此前沙漠狐队在世界杯32轮比赛中以2比0击败瑞士队。

title.en: Aston Villa sign Norway midfielder Kielland
title.zh-CN: 阿斯顿维拉签约挪威中场Kielland

summary.en:
Norway midfielder Justine Kielland joins Aston Villa from German club Wolfsburg, subject to visa approval.
Kielland joined Norwegian side Brann in 2023. During her time there, she helped the club...
summary.zh-CN:
挪威中场球员贾斯汀·基兰德（ Justine Kielland ）加入德国沃尔夫斯堡俱乐部的阿斯顿维拉，但需获得签证批准。
Kielland于2023年加入挪威方面的Brann。 在那里，她帮助了俱乐部……
